title: Weird Pirated Games: Super Mario 17 (Chip n Dale hack) NES
description:
I've been searching for this one for quite a while.
This is a pretty fun hack of Chip & Dale Rescue Rangers for the NES. Aside from changing the main sprites, the robot dogs were changed to Bowsers and mice were changed to Yoshis. Apparently you get to choose between MALI and LUGI, who are FIGHTING OF THE MALILUGI.
